Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 - Search emails for Carla Mendenhall's communication about the Axiom services agreement using search_emails with a query related to "Carla" or "Axiom" or "services agreement" (or similar). Find Carla Mendenhall's email (c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com to emeka.diallo@moveops.com) saying "Could you please send over a services agreement so our finance team can review and process it?" and noting Axiom plans to expand its Seattle presence with more relocations. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 2 - Search CRM for Axiom company record using crm_search_companies with name "Axiom" (or similar). Find company_axiom with type "Prospect", domain axiomprecision.com, industry Manufacturing, 900 employees, headquartered in Detroit MI. Note the type is still "Prospect" despite Axiom being an active client. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 3 - Search CRM for Axiom deals using crm_search_deals with company_id "company_axiom". Find NO deals exist for Axiom in the CRM -- despite Emeka's self-memo email referencing a deal status change to "CLOSED WON." This is a read/lookup action.
OE 4 - Look up Axiom contacts by using crm_get_company with id "company_axiom" to retrieve the linked contact_ids, then crm_get_contact for each returned contact_id. Alternatively, search using crm_search_contacts with full_name "Carla Mendenhall" and full_name "Noah Fitzpatrick" to check whether they exist. Find only one linked contact: Gary Meissner (contact_axiom_001), VP of Human Resources, g.meissner@axiomprecision.com. Carla Mendenhall (the actual active HR Director) and Noah Fitzpatrick (the relocating employee) are NOT in the CRM. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 5 - Search Airtable Client Accounts table for Axiom using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Client Accounts", field_name "Client", value "Axiom" (or similar). Find record recAcct000000013 showing Client: Axiom Precision Manufacturing, Account Manager: Emeka Diallo, Status: "Cold Outreach", Total Relocations: 0, Notes: "Manufacturing. HQ: Detroit, MI. 900 employees. Cold outreach sent - no response yet." All of these are stale and need updating. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 6 - Search Airtable Relocations table for Noah Fitzpatrick using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", field_name "Name", value "Noah Fitzpatrick" (or similar). Find NO relocation record exists for Fitzpatrick. This absence is a critical finding. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 7 - Search Airtable Relocations table for Noah Fitzgerald using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", field_name "Name", value "Noah Fitzgerald" (or similar). Find record recReloc00000006: Noah Fitzgerald, Company: GreenStack Energy, Status: Completed, Origin: Philadelphia PA, Destination: Seattle WA, Move Start Date: 2026-04-28, Move End Date: 2026-04-29, Assigned Coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi. This record is correctly attributed to GreenStack. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 8 - Search Linear for issues related to Fitzpatrick or Axiom using linear_list_issues with query "Fitzpatrick" or "Axiom" (or similar). Find linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 (number 287): "Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic" -- this is an overload ticket, not a relocation intake ticket. No dedicated Fitzpatrick relocation intake ticket exists in Linear despite Fatimah's email to Emeka claiming she "updated the Axiom/Fitzpatrick Linear ticket." This is a read/lookup action.
OE 9 - Search Linear for issues related to Fitzgerald or GreenStack using linear_list_issues with query "Fitzgerald" or "GreenStack" (or similar). Find three clean GreenStack/Fitzgerald tickets: issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (number 316, Apartment Search, state in_progress, proj_greenstack), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (number 317, Flight Booking, state todo, target date April 27), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (number 318, Moving Coordination, state todo, target move date April 28-29). All correctly show GreenStack Energy details. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 10 - Search emails for Fatimah's confirmation to Noah Fitzpatrick using search_emails with query "Fitzpatrick" or "Fatimah Axiom" (or similar). Find Fatimah's confirmation email to n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com containing: apartment at 412 Boylston Ave E, Apt 3B, Capitol Hill, Seattle WA 98102 (UrbanNest Corporate Housing), flight Alaska Airlines AS 422 on April 14 with confirmation ACT-77492, and Javier Morales as on-the-ground coordinator. These are the details the agent must later cross-reference against Fitzgerald's sourcing. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 11 - Search emails for the UrbanNest apartment sourcing chain using search_emails with query "UrbanNest" or "apartment" or "Fitzgerald" or "Carmen Reyes" (or similar). Find Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest (carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com) sending 3 apartment options explicitly labeled "for Noah Fitzgerald" under the subject "Apartment Request -- Seattle -- Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack Energy)." Option A is 412 Boylston Ave E, Apt 3B, Capitol Hill at $2,100/month. Fatimah selected Option A for Fitzgerald and confirmed move-in April 28. This proves the apartment was sourced for Fitzgerald (GreenStack), not Fitzpatrick (Axiom). This is a read/lookup action.
OE 12 - Search emails for the Atlas flight booking chain using search_emails with query "Atlas" or "flight" or "Fitzgerald" or "Derek Saunders" (or similar). Find Fatimah's booking request to derek.saunders@atlascorporatetravel.com for passenger "Noah Fitzgerald" under GreenStack Energy, and Derek Saunders' confirmation: ACT-77492, Alaska Airlines AS 422, April 14, PHL to SEA. This proves the flight was booked for Fitzgerald (GreenStack), not Fitzpatrick (Axiom). The agent must recognize that the same confirmation number ACT-77492 and flight AS 422 appear in both Fitzpatrick's confirmation (OE 10) and Fitzgerald's original booking -- confirming cross-contamination. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 13 - Search Slack for the Emeka-Fatimah handoff discussion about the two Noahs using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Fitzpatrick" or "Axiom Noah" or "two Noahs" (or similar). Find messages in channel C006 (#operations) where Emeka tells Fatimah about the Axiom intake, Fatimah asks "is the Axiom one Fitzpatrick or Fitzgerald?", Emeka confirms "Fitzpatrick -- the Axiom one. Fitzgerald is GreenStack", and Fatimah acknowledges "Fitzpatrick = Axiom, Fitzgerald = GreenStack." Despite this explicit confirmation, the contamination still occurred. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 14 - Search Slack for Fatimah's intake completion message and Emeka's account announcements using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick intake" (or similar). Find Fatimah's message in C006 stating "The Axiom/Fitzpatrick intake is complete. I've sent confirmation to Noah, and he's ready for April 14. I updated the Linear ticket with all the details (apartment, flight, Javier on-site)" -- note she claims to have updated a Linear ticket that does not exist (per OE 8). Also find Emeka's message in C002 stating "I just entered Axiom Precision Manufacturing into the CRM" and his later announcement "Axiom Precision Manufacturing is officially a new client" with "Carla is happy and asking for a services agreement -- will draft and send today." These Slack claims further confirm the gap between what was communicated internally and what actually persisted in the systems. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 15 - List Slack channels using channels_list with channel_types "public_channel" to find the channel_id for #operations. Find C006 = #operations. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 16 - Search CRM engagements for Axiom using crm_list_engagements with company_ids containing "company_axiom". Find NO engagements exist for Axiom. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 17 - Update the Axiom Client Account record in Airtable using airtable_update_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id "tblClientAccts01", record id "recAcct000000013". Update fields: Status from "Cold Outreach" to "Active" (or "Onboarding"), Total Relocations from 0 to 1, Contract Type to "Full-Service Relocation" (or similar), and Notes updated to reflect Carla Mendenhall as primary contact and the active relocation for Noah Fitzpatrick. This is a write action.
OE 18 - Create a relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick in Airtable using airtable_create_record with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", fields: Name "Noah Fitzpatrick", Company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", Status "In Progress" (or similar), Origin "Philadelphia, PA", Destination "Seattle, WA", Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi". Move dates and specific logistics (apartment, flight) should not use the contaminated Fitzgerald details -- correct bookings are pending per the remediation ticket (OE 23). This is a write action.
OE 19 - Create a CRM contact for Carla Mendenhall using crm_create_contact with full_name "Carla Mendenhall", email "c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com", company_id "company_axiom", company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", jobtitle "HR Director". This is a write action.
OE 20 - Create a CRM contact for Noah Fitzpatrick using crm_create_contact with full_name "Noah Fitzpatrick", email "n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com", company_id "company_axiom", company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", jobtitle "Senior Engineer". This is a write action.
OE 21 - Create a CRM deal for the Axiom relocation using crm_create_deal with dealname "Axiom Precision Manufacturing -- Noah Fitzpatrick Relocation" (or similar), dealstage "contractsent" or "closedwon", company_id "company_axiom", amount "12500", pipeline "relocation-services", description covering the full-service Philadelphia to Seattle relocation. This is a write action.
OE 22 - Create a CRM engagement note logging the audit findings using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", body containing the audit results (missing records found, cross-contamination identified, corrections made), and company_ids including "company_axiom". This is a write action.
OE 23 - Create a Linear issue to track the data contamination remediation using linear_create_issue with team "team_operations" or "team_relocations", title referencing the Fitzpatrick/Fitzgerald data mix-up or Axiom data integrity issue (or similar), description covering: the apartment (412 Boylston) and flight (ACT-77492) were sourced for Fitzgerald (GreenStack) but sent to Fitzpatrick (Axiom), vendor bookings at Atlas and UrbanNest need correction, and Fitzpatrick needs his own apartment and flight booked. Priority should be 1 or 2 (urgent). This is a write action.
OE 24 - Post a message in #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006", user_id "moveops_emeka_diallo", payload containing an alert about the two-Noahs data mix-up: Fitzpatrick (Axiom) received Fitzgerald's (GreenStack) apartment and flight details, the contamination needs vendor-level correction at Atlas Corporate Travel and UrbanNest, Fitzgerald may be missing his own bookings for his April 27-29 dates, and a tracking ticket has been created. This is a write action.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

Oracle Events
OE 1 - Search emails for Carla Mendenhall's communication about the Axiom services agreement using search_emails with a query related to "Carla" or "Axiom" or "services agreement" (or similar). Find Carla Mendenhall's email (c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com to emeka.diallo@moveops.com) saying "Could you please send over a services agreement so our finance team can review and process it?" and noting Axiom plans to expand its Seattle presence with more relocations. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 2 - Search CRM for Axiom company record using crm_search_companies with name "Axiom" (or similar). Find company_axiom with type "Prospect", domain axiomprecision.com, industry Manufacturing, 900 employees, headquartered in Detroit MI. Note the type is still "Prospect" despite Axiom being an active client. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 3 - Search CRM for Axiom deals using crm_search_deals with company_id "company_axiom". Find NO deals exist for Axiom in the CRM -- despite Emeka's self-memo email referencing a deal status change to "CLOSED WON." This is a read/lookup action.
OE 4 - Look up Axiom contacts by using crm_get_company with id "company_axiom" to retrieve the linked contact_ids, then crm_get_contact for each returned contact_id. Alternatively, search using crm_search_contacts with full_name "Carla Mendenhall" and full_name "Noah Fitzpatrick" to check whether they exist. Find only one linked contact: Gary Meissner (contact_axiom_001), VP of Human Resources, g.meissner@axiomprecision.com. Carla Mendenhall (the actual active HR Director) and Noah Fitzpatrick (the relocating employee) are NOT in the CRM. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 5 - Search Airtable Client Accounts table for Axiom using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Client Accounts", field_name "Client", value "Axiom" (or similar). Find record recAcct000000013 showing Client: Axiom Precision Manufacturing, Account Manager: Emeka Diallo, Status: "Cold Outreach", Total Relocations: 0, Notes: "Manufacturing. HQ: Detroit, MI. 900 employees. Cold outreach sent - no response yet." All of these are stale and need updating. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 6 - Search Airtable Relocations table for Noah Fitzpatrick using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", field_name "Name", value "Noah Fitzpatrick" (or similar). Find NO relocation record exists for Fitzpatrick. This absence is a critical finding. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 7 - Search Airtable Relocations table for Noah Fitzgerald using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", field_name "Name", value "Noah Fitzgerald" (or similar). Find record recReloc00000006: Noah Fitzgerald, Company: GreenStack Energy, Status: Completed, Origin: Philadelphia PA, Destination: Seattle WA, Move Start Date: 2026-04-28, Move End Date: 2026-04-29, Assigned Coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi. This record is correctly attributed to GreenStack. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 8 - Search Linear for issues related to Fitzpatrick or Axiom using linear_list_issues with query "Fitzpatrick" or "Axiom" (or similar). Find linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 (number 287): "Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic" -- this is an overload ticket, not a relocation intake ticket. No dedicated Fitzpatrick relocation intake ticket exists in Linear despite Fatimah's email to Emeka claiming she "updated the Axiom/Fitzpatrick Linear ticket." This is a read/lookup action.
OE 9 - Search Linear for issues related to Fitzgerald or GreenStack using linear_list_issues with query "Fitzgerald" or "GreenStack" (or similar). Find three clean GreenStack/Fitzgerald tickets: issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (number 316, Apartment Search, state in_progress, proj_greenstack), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (number 317, Flight Booking, state todo, target date April 27), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (number 318, Moving Coordination, state todo, target move date April 28-29). All correctly show GreenStack Energy details. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 10 - Search emails for Fatimah's confirmation to Noah Fitzpatrick using search_emails with query "Fitzpatrick" or "Fatimah Axiom" (or similar). Find Fatimah's confirmation email to n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com containing: apartment at 412 Boylston Ave E, Apt 3B, Capitol Hill, Seattle WA 98102 (UrbanNest Corporate Housing), flight Alaska Airlines AS 422 on April 14 with confirmation ACT-77492, and Javier Morales as on-the-ground coordinator. These are the details the agent must later cross-reference against Fitzgerald's sourcing. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 11 - Search emails for the UrbanNest apartment sourcing chain using search_emails with query "UrbanNest" or "apartment" or "Fitzgerald" or "Carmen Reyes" (or similar). Find Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest (carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com) sending 3 apartment options explicitly labeled "for Noah Fitzgerald" under the subject "Apartment Request -- Seattle -- Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack Energy)." Option A is 412 Boylston Ave E, Apt 3B, Capitol Hill at $2,100/month. Fatimah selected Option A for Fitzgerald and confirmed move-in April 28. This proves the apartment was sourced for Fitzgerald (GreenStack), not Fitzpatrick (Axiom). This is a read/lookup action.
OE 12 - Search emails for the Atlas flight booking chain using search_emails with query "Atlas" or "flight" or "Fitzgerald" or "Derek Saunders" (or similar). Find Fatimah's booking request to derek.saunders@atlascorporatetravel.com for passenger "Noah Fitzgerald" under GreenStack Energy, and Derek Saunders' confirmation: ACT-77492, Alaska Airlines AS 422, April 14, PHL to SEA. This proves the flight was booked for Fitzgerald (GreenStack), not Fitzpatrick (Axiom). The agent must recognize that the same confirmation number ACT-77492 and flight AS 422 appear in both Fitzpatrick's confirmation (OE 10) and Fitzgerald's original booking -- confirming cross-contamination. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 13 - Search Slack for the Emeka-Fatimah handoff discussion about the two Noahs using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Fitzpatrick" or "Axiom Noah" or "two Noahs" (or similar). Find messages in channel C006 (#operations) where Emeka tells Fatimah about the Axiom intake, Fatimah asks "is the Axiom one Fitzpatrick or Fitzgerald?", Emeka confirms "Fitzpatrick -- the Axiom one. Fitzgerald is GreenStack", and Fatimah acknowledges "Fitzpatrick = Axiom, Fitzgerald = GreenStack." Despite this explicit confirmation, the contamination still occurred. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 14 - Search Slack for Fatimah's intake completion message and Emeka's account announcements using conversations_search_messages with search_query "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick intake" (or similar). Find Fatimah's message in C006 stating "The Axiom/Fitzpatrick intake is complete. I've sent confirmation to Noah, and he's ready for April 14. I updated the Linear ticket with all the details (apartment, flight, Javier on-site)" -- note she claims to have updated a Linear ticket that does not exist (per OE 8). Also find Emeka's message in C002 stating "I just entered Axiom Precision Manufacturing into the CRM" and his later announcement "Axiom Precision Manufacturing is officially a new client" with "Carla is happy and asking for a services agreement -- will draft and send today." These Slack claims further confirm the gap between what was communicated internally and what actually persisted in the systems. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 15 - List Slack channels using channels_list with channel_types "public_channel" to find the channel_id for #operations. Find C006 = #operations. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 16 - Search CRM engagements for Axiom using crm_list_engagements with company_ids containing "company_axiom". Find NO engagements exist for Axiom. This is a read/lookup action.
OE 17 - Update the Axiom Client Account record in Airtable using airtable_update_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id "tblClientAccts01", record id "recAcct000000013". Update fields: Status from "Cold Outreach" to "Active" (or "Onboarding"), Total Relocations from 0 to 1, Contract Type to "Full-Service Relocation" (or similar), and Notes updated to reflect Carla Mendenhall as primary contact and the active relocation for Noah Fitzpatrick. This is a write action.
OE 18 - Create a relocation record for Noah Fitzpatrick in Airtable using airtable_create_record with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", fields: Name "Noah Fitzpatrick", Company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", Status "In Progress" (or similar), Origin "Philadelphia, PA", Destination "Seattle, WA", Assigned Coordinator "Fatimah Al-Rashidi". Move dates and specific logistics (apartment, flight) should not use the contaminated Fitzgerald details -- correct bookings are pending per the remediation ticket (OE 23). This is a write action.
OE 19 - Create a CRM contact for Carla Mendenhall using crm_create_contact with full_name "Carla Mendenhall", email "c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com", company_id "company_axiom", company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", jobtitle "HR Director". This is a write action.
OE 20 - Create a CRM contact for Noah Fitzpatrick using crm_create_contact with full_name "Noah Fitzpatrick", email "n.fitzpatrick@axiomprecision.com", company_id "company_axiom", company "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", jobtitle "Senior Engineer". This is a write action.
OE 21 - Create a CRM deal for the Axiom relocation using crm_create_deal with dealname "Axiom Precision Manufacturing -- Noah Fitzpatrick Relocation" (or similar), dealstage "contractsent" or "closedwon", company_id "company_axiom", amount "12500", pipeline "relocation-services", description covering the full-service Philadelphia to Seattle relocation. This is a write action.
OE 22 - Create a CRM engagement note logging the audit findings using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", body containing the audit results (missing records found, cross-contamination identified, corrections made), and company_ids including "company_axiom". This is a write action.
OE 23 - Create a Linear issue to track the data contamination remediation using linear_create_issue with team "team_operations" or "team_relocations", title referencing the Fitzpatrick/Fitzgerald data mix-up or Axiom data integrity issue (or similar), description covering: the apartment (412 Boylston) and flight (ACT-77492) were sourced for Fitzgerald (GreenStack) but sent to Fitzpatrick (Axiom), vendor bookings at Atlas and UrbanNest need correction, and Fitzpatrick needs his own apartment and flight booked. Priority should be 1 or 2 (urgent). This is a write action.
OE 24 - Post a message in #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006", user_id "moveops_emeka_diallo", payload containing an alert about the two-Noahs data mix-up: Fitzpatrick (Axiom) received Fitzgerald's (GreenStack) apartment and flight details, the contamination needs vendor-level correction at Atlas Corporate Travel and UrbanNest, Fitzgerald may be missing his own bookings for his April 27-29 dates, and a tracking ticket has been created. This is a write action.

23 The conversations_add_message payload for channel C006 states that Noah Fitzpatrick at Axiom received apartment and/or flight details tied to Noah Fitzgerald at GreenStack (or similar).
outcome
 ✗✓—✗✓— 50%
✗Run #1The Slack payload for C006 states 'No cross-contamination' was found and does not state that Noah Fitzpatrick received apartment or flight details tied to Noah Fitzgerald. The agent found missing tracking records but not actual logistics mix-up between the two clients.
✓Run #2The Slack payload explicitly states the flight (AS 422) and UrbanNest apartment were 'filed under Fitzgerald/GreenStack — it should be under Fitzpatrick/Axiom', clearly describing the cross-person mix-up.
